untranslatable_reason: Signal specifies 'small body' and 'long lower shadow relative to upper shadow and body' but these are qualitative comparisons without absolute thresholds. The exact ratio/percentage defining 'small' and 'long' is not provided in source material. Stop placement rule and target price computation are marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no guidance. Success rates for bearish scenarios and other performance metrics are also AUTHOR_SILENT.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core Hanging Man pattern mechanics: small body (lower_wick > upper_wick indicates lower shadow dominance), appearing after uptrend (close > sma_20 as trend proxy). Entry is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal but translated to LONG bias given 59% continuation in uptrends. Exit condition inferred as close below previous close (reversal trigger). Breakout direction is BOTH but pattern behavior is primarily continuation-focused in uptrends. Missing quantitative thresholds prevent precise rule definition.
